base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gohma_eye_open_close — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Gohma — crab-creature with eye. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gohma — crab-creature with eye; 4-frame eye-open-close cycle. Boss of Level 6 (Dragon, red variant) + Level 9 (blue variant). Only vulnerable when eye open; arrows only
